instructions: 1. Sauté onions, ginger, and green chillies. 2. Add diced potatoes and cauliflower florets with spices. 3. Mix in chopped tomatoes and cook until soft. 4. Garnish with fresh coriander.
1. Boil toor dal until soft. 2. Cook chopped radish, lady-finger, onions, and tomatoes in tamarind water. 3. Add sambar powder and mix with cooked dal. 4. Temper with mustard seeds and curry leaves.
1. Blanch and puree the palak (spinach). 2. Sauté cumin seeds, green chillies, and tomatoes. 3. Add boiled cubed potatoes and pour in the spinach puree. 4. Simmer for 5 minutes.
1. Wash and dry bhindi thoroughly, then chop into pieces. 2. Stir fry bhindi until non-sticky, then remove. 3. Sauté sliced onions, green chillies, and tomatoes. 4. Toss bhindi back in with spices.
